Campaign Page - B2B

Complete Kickstarter/Indiegogo campaign page copy for commercial property managers and hospitality operators

HeyZack B2B Campaign Page Copy

Target Audience: Commercial Property Managers, Hospitality Operators
Voice: Professional, Data-Driven, Efficient (The Helpful Peer)
Platform: Kickstarter/Indiegogo B2B Early Adopter Campaign

1. Above the Fold

Qualifier

For Property Managers & Hospitality Operators Managing 3+ Properties

Headline

Cut Operating Costs 20-30% Across Your Entire Portfolio—Without $85K BMS Systems or Vendor Lock-In

Subhead

HeyZack delivers AI-powered building automation at 95% lower cost than traditional systems. One dashboard manages unlimited properties with genuine learning intelligence, transparent ROI tracking, and DIY installation. No service contracts. No vendor dependencies. Just proven savings.

Trust Anchors

  • ✓ Portfolio-Scale Control: One dashboard, unlimited properties
  • ✓ Proven ROI: 20-30% average energy cost reduction with real-time tracking
  • ✓ DIY Installation: Deploy new properties in 2 hours, not 2 months
  • ✓ Zero Vendor Lock-In: Open protocols, no mandatory service contracts
  • ✓ Commercial-Grade Reliability: IP65 rated, -20°C to 60°C operation, bank-level security

Hero Image Spec

Visual: Split-screen comparison
Left Side: Stressed property manager juggling 7 different app screens (thermostat, security, access control, energy monitor) with red “alert” notifications everywhere. Text overlay: “The Old Way: $85K BMS + $15K/year vendor fees + 2-month setup”
Right Side: Confident property manager on phone, single tablet showing unified dashboard with 30 properties, all green status indicators. Energy savings graph trending down 28%. Text overlay: “The HeyZack Way: $5K setup + $0 monthly fees + 2-hour deployment”

Primary CTA

[Reserve Your Portfolio Beta Access — 60% Early Adopter Pricing]

2. Old World (Problem/Agitation)

Bleeding Neck Narrative

You’re managing 20 properties with a 5-person team.

It’s 9 PM on Friday. Your phone rings. Again. Tenant in Building F: “The heat isn’t working.” You log into the BMS system—if you can remember the password for that specific building. The vendor-installed system requires a $200/hour after-hours service call just to adjust a thermostat remotely.

Or maybe you tried the “smart” route. Consumer-grade Nest thermostats, Ring cameras, smart locks. Seemed cheaper upfront. Now you’re juggling seven different apps, tenants keep factory-resetting devices, and when something breaks, you’re chatting with a consumer support bot that tells you to “restart the device.”

Meanwhile, ownership wants answers:

  • “Why are utility costs up 12% this quarter?”
  • “Can we prove our buildings are more efficient than competitors?”
  • “What’s our plan to scale to 40 properties without doubling headcount?”

You know the data exists—energy consumption, occupancy patterns, system failures—but it’s trapped in disconnected systems. You’re flying blind with a $2.4M annual operating budget.

Failed Alternatives

You’ve Tried Everything:

SolutionThe PromiseThe RealityAnnual Cost (10 Properties)
Traditional BMS (Honeywell, Johnson Controls)“Enterprise-grade building management”$85K per building installation + $15K/year maintenance. Every change requires vendor service call. No cross-property visibility.$1M+ upfront + $150K/year
Consumer Smart Products (Nest, Ring, Ecobee)“Easy smart home tech for buildings”7+ separate apps. No commercial support. Tenants reset devices. No portfolio dashboard. Breaks during critical moments.$15K + 80 hours/year firefighting
Property Tech “Integrations” (Yardi, AppFolio modules)“Smart building ready!”Shows data from other systems but doesn’t control anything. You’re still paying for legacy BMS. Just adds another dashboard layer.$8K/year + existing BMS costs
Hiring More Staff”Dedicated facility manager per property”Labor costs scale linearly. $65K salary + benefits per building = compressed margins. Doesn’t solve root problem.$650K/year (10 properties)

False Trade-Off

The Industry Keeps Telling You to Choose:

[-] Enterprise-Grade Reliability (expensive, vendor lock-in, slow deployment)
OR
[-] Affordable DIY Solutions (unreliable, no commercial support, doesn’t scale)

[-] Centralized Control Across Portfolio (requires $500K+ platform investment)
OR
[-] Per-Building Management (manageable cost but operational chaos)

[-] Genuine AI Intelligence (requires data science team and custom development)
OR
[-] Basic Timer-Based Scheduling (affordable but delivers minimal ROI)

What if you didn’t have to choose?

3. New World (Solution/Features)

Mechanism Reveal

Introducing: AI-Powered Portfolio Automation at 95% Lower Cost

HeyZack is the first building automation platform designed specifically for portfolio-scale operators who need enterprise performance without enterprise costs.

The Three-Part System:

  1. Universal Device Ecosystem (128 Products)
    Cameras, sensors, smart switches, door locks, climate control, lighting, motorized curtains—all from one platform. Deploy exactly what each property needs. No forced bundles.

  2. Genuine AI Learning Engine
    Not rule-based scheduling. Pattern recognition AI that learns actual occupancy behaviors, seasonal shifts, and energy waste patterns. Automatically optimizes across your portfolio without manual programming.

  3. Portfolio Command Center
    One unified dashboard manages unlimited properties. See energy consumption, system status, alerts, and ROI data across every building. Filter by property, region, or portfolio-wide.

The Result: Commercial-grade automation that installs in 2 hours per property, costs $5K instead of $85K, and requires zero service contracts.

Feature-Benefit-Emotion Triads

FeatureFunctional BenefitEmotional Payoff
Portfolio DashboardManage 40 buildings from one screen—same effort as managing 15 buildings the old wayProfessional Pride: “I’m the property manager everyone asks for advice now”
Real-Time Energy AnalyticsSee exactly which buildings waste energy and why. Track dollar savings per property per month.Data-Driven Confidence: Walk into owner meetings with proof: “We saved $47K in Q3”
Predictive AlertsAI detects HVAC cycling 40% above baseline—alerts you before it fails. Schedule $800 preventive maintenance instead of $12K emergency replacement.Operational Control: Sleep through the night knowing you’ll know about problems before tenants do
DIY InstallationDeploy new property in 2 hours. No electrician, no vendor project manager, no multi-week timelines. Scan QR codes, mount devices, done.Scalability Confidence: “I can take on 10 new acquisitions without operational fear”
Zero Vendor Lock-InOpen protocols (WiFi, Zigbee, Matter). Local control works during outages. Export your data anytime.Vendor Liberation: “Never held hostage by service contracts again”
Guest/Tenant Automation (Hospitality)Check-in triggers access code + climate pre-conditioning. Check-out triggers energy savings mode + security arm. Zero manual intervention.Operational Freedom: Manage 10 hotels as easily as you managed 3
Automated Energy OptimizationAI learns “Building C is empty 9 AM-5 PM weekdays” and adjusts HVAC automatically. No manual scheduling.ROI Validation: Utility costs drop 28% in first quarter—ownership is thrilled
Remote Climate ControlTenant calls: “Too hot.” You adjust thermostat from your phone in 90 seconds while sitting in a different city.Work-Life Balance: No more driving across town for thermostat adjustments
Multi-Protocol SupportWorks with existing Nest thermostats, Ring cameras, Philips lights, plus HeyZack’s 128-product ecosystemInvestment Protection: “I’m not throwing away $40K in existing devices”

Technical Deep Dive

Enterprise-Grade Specifications:

Connectivity & Protocols:

  • WiFi (2.4GHz & 5GHz dual-band)
  • Zigbee 3.0 mesh networking (300+ meter range)
  • Bluetooth BLE & BLE Mesh
  • Matter protocol gateway support
  • IR universal remote (38KHz)

Reliability Standards:

  • IP65 weather resistance for outdoor devices
  • Operating temperature: -20°C to 60°C
  • Bank-level AES-256 encryption
  • Local + cloud hybrid architecture (works during internet outages)
  • Edge computing on control panels
  • 99.9% uptime SLA (Enterprise tier)

Commercial Power Options:

  • Hardwired AC 100-240V
  • Solar-powered (6W panels with lithium backup)
  • Battery-powered with 12-month lifespan
  • USB-C powered for retrofits

Integration Capabilities:

  • REST API for property management software integration
  • Alexa for Business, Google Workspace compatible
  • Data export tools (CSV, JSON)
  • IFTTT and Zapier webhook support

Scalability:

  • Unlimited properties per account
  • Up to 500 devices per property
  • Multi-user access with role-based permissions
  • White-label dashboard option (Enterprise tier)

Ecosystem (Product Portfolio)

Deploy Exactly What Each Property Needs:

CategoryUse CaseExample Configuration
Climate Control PackageMulti-family buildings, hotelsSmart thermostats (WiFi/Zigbee) + temperature sensors + radiator valves + floor heating controllers. Portfolio-wide energy optimization.
Access & Security PackageOffice buildings, vacation rentalsSmart door locks (face recognition, fingerprint, keypad) + video doorbells + indoor/outdoor cameras (2K resolution) + motion sensors. Automated guest access codes.
Energy Monitoring PackageCommercial properties with budget scrutinySmart circuit breakers + power monitoring switches + energy analytics dashboard. Real-time cost tracking per room/zone.
Lighting & Ambiance PackageHospitality, high-end residentialSmart switches (1-4 gang) + LED dimmers + RGB controllers + motorized curtain systems. Scene automation for guest experiences.
Complete Building PackageFull property automationAll categories integrated. Central control panel (10.1” touchscreen) acts as property hub. AI learns patterns across all systems.

128 Products. 15 Categories. Mix and Match.

4. Social Proof

As Seen In / Industry Recognition

Launching Spring 2026 — Early Portfolio Beta Program

Pre-Launch Partnerships:

  • ✓ Commercial Real Estate Technology Council — Smart Building Innovation Track
  • ✓ National Apartment Association (NAA) — PropTech Member
  • ✓ Hospitality Technology Professionals Association — Pilot Program
  • ✓ Zigbee Alliance Certified Member
  • ✓ Matter Protocol Certified Gateway
  • ✓ ISO 27001 Information Security Certified (In Progress)

Testimonials (Beta Partner Quotes)

Patricia Chen, Portfolio Manager, Urban Living Properties (32 Multi-Family Buildings)

“We piloted HeyZack in 3 buildings last quarter. Energy costs dropped 28%, tenant comfort complaints fell 65%, and I deployed the other 29 buildings in two weeks. This is what BMS systems should have been from the start—minus the $2.4M price tag and vendor handcuffs.”

Hugo Martinez, Operations Director, Coastal Boutique Hotels (8 Properties)

“Our guest review scores jumped from 4.2 to 4.7 stars after implementing HeyZack. Rooms are pre-conditioned perfectly for arrivals, energy waste between occupancy disappeared, and I manage all 8 hotels from my phone. ROI hit in 6 months. I’m never going back to the old way.”

Michael Thompson, Facilities Director, Metro Office Parks (14 Buildings)

“I was skeptical about ‘DIY’ building automation. Then I deployed the first building myself in 90 minutes. Real-time energy data showed us our HVAC in Building 7 was cycling 40% more than it should—caught a failing compressor before it died. Preventive maintenance saved us $15K. The system paid for itself in one incident.”

User Count / Traction

Pre-Launch Portfolio Beta:

  • 47 Property Managers Applied (18 Accepted)
  • 142 Buildings Enrolled in Pilot Program
  • $487K Total Annual Energy Savings (Pilot Data, 9 Months)
  • 4.8/5 Average Operator Satisfaction Score

5. Pricing & Packages

B2B Commercial Packages

TierPropertiesPrice Per BuildingRetail ValueYou Save
Essential1-5$4,999$8,00038%
Professional6-20$3,999$6,50039%
Enterprise21+$2,999$5,00040%

What’s Included

Each Building Package Contains:

  • 1x HeyZack Control Panel (10.1” touchscreen + Zigbee gateway)
  • Climate control suite (thermostats + sensors)
  • Access control (smart locks + video doorbell)
  • Security (cameras + motion sensors)
  • Energy monitoring (smart switches + circuit breaker)
  • All mounting hardware and installation guides
  • 24/7 support access
  • Portfolio dashboard access

Early Adopter Benefits

  • 60% off retail pricing (launch week only)
  • Priority shipping (Batch 1: June 2026)
  • Dedicated implementation support
  • Lifetime firmware updates
  • 30-day money-back guarantee
